focus: Arena Field Edition — wired the §9 update channel's signature gate to REAL cosign verify. New fieldkit.field_edition.cosign: verify_matrix() filters a fetched proven matrix to its ghcr.io/orionfold @sha256 images (skips pgvector/NIM) and runs cosign verify --key against a pinned public key (PROVEN_MATRIX_COSIGN_PUBKEY, byte-matched to the committed deploy/field-edition/cosign/proven-matrix.pub — a test enforces no drift), raising CosignVerifyError on bad/absent sig or missing cosign. LiveUpdateChannel.verify_signature calls it (signed-flag check first, then cosign); the cosign subprocess is an injected runner seam so the logic is unit-testable without the binary. Same pin-a-committed-pubkey pattern as license.TRUSTED_KEYS.
